Guest Reviews
🇺🇸 Sarah M.

"Absolutely magical! The murals and Andean decor made us feel immersed in local culture. Breakfast was incredible and the staff went above and beyond."

🇩🇪 Thomas K.

"Perfect location near San Pedro Market. The rooms are warm and cozy — essential for cold Cusco nights. Will definitely return!"

🇧🇷 Ana L.

"The airport transfer service was a lifesaver. Hotel is charming, clean, and the staff speaks English fluently. Great value for money."

🇬🇧 James P.

"Lovely boutique hotel with character. The spa massage after a long day of hiking was exactly what we needed. Highly recommended!"

🇯🇵 Yuki T.

"Beautiful hotel with authentic Cusco charm. They helped us arrange our Machu Picchu tour and it was seamless. The breakfast is fresh and delicious."

🇪🇸 Elena R.

"A beautiful hidden gem in Cusco. Excellent service, hot water 24h, and heaters that work perfectly. Super close to the historic market."

🇨🇦 Mark B.

"Very clean rooms, comfortable beds, and a delicious breakfast buffet. The staff helped us book a safe taxi from the airport. Highly recommended!"

🇫🇷 Sophie D.

"Outstanding boutique hotel! Hand-painted murals in the room are stunning. Having heaters was amazing for cold nights. 10/10 experience!"

About Us

Discover Our Essence

To create memorable experiences that allow every traveler to discover the essence of Cusco, providing a warm, personalized, and excellent service that makes every stay an unforgettable memory.

Our Mission

To provide a unique lodging experience in the heart of Cusco, offering personalized, warm, and high-quality service that combines comfort, hospitality, and the richness of local culture. We are committed to exceeding our guests' expectations through exceptional care, a passionate team, and sustainable tourism practices.

Our Vision

To be the benchmark hotel in Cusco, maintaining the essence of our culture. We aspire to be the first choice for travelers seeking excellence, warmth, and personalized service, distinguishing ourselves through our hospitality, innovation, and commitment to sustainability.

Explore Cusco

Discover the wonders that await just outside your door

historical112 km

Machu Picchu

The iconic Inca citadel and UNESCO World Heritage Site. One of the New Seven Wonders of the World.

4h by train
nature30 km

Sacred Valley

Stunning valley with ancient Inca ruins, colorful markets, and breathtaking landscapes.

1h by car
historical2 km

Sacsayhuamán

Massive Inca fortress with perfectly fitted stone walls, overlooking Cusco.

10min by car
adventure100 km

Rainbow Mountain

Vinicunca, the stunning Rainbow Mountain with layers of colorful minerals at 5,200m altitude.

3h by car
View all attractions
FAQ

Frequently Asked Questions

Everything you need to know about your stay in Cusco: altitude sickness, check-in, transport, and more.

What are the check-in and check-out times?
Check-in is from 11:30 AM, and check-out is until 10:00 AM. If you arrive earlier, we will gladly store your luggage for free or check you in early if your room is already prepared.
How can I prevent altitude sickness (soroche)?
Cusco is at 3,400 meters (11,150 feet). To help you acclimatize, we offer complimentary hot Coca tea 24/7 in our lobby. We recommend resting for the first few hours, drinking plenty of water, eating light meals, and avoiding alcohol. We also have oxygen assistance available at the reception if needed.
Do you offer airport or train station transfers?
Yes, we offer private transfer services. You can arrange a safe, comfortable pickup from Alejandro Velasco Astete Airport (CUZ) or the Poroy/Wanchaq train stations. Please contact us via email or WhatsApp with your flight/train details at least 24 hours in advance to schedule.
Is breakfast included and what time is it served?
Yes, a fresh buffet breakfast featuring local Andean fruits, breads, cheese, eggs, coffee, and traditional herbal teas is included with all room rates. It is served daily from 6:00 AM to 9:00 AM, allowing plenty of time before you start early day tours to Machu Picchu or the Sacred Valley.
Can I leave my luggage at the hotel while visiting Machu Picchu?
Absolutely! We provide free, secure luggage storage for all our guests. You can leave your large suitcases with us while you travel to Machu Picchu or the Sacred Valley with a smaller daypack, and retrieve them when you return.
Do rooms have heating and 24/7 hot water?
Yes, all our rooms are equipped with heating units to keep you warm during the chilly Cusco nights. Additionally, we have a reliable high-pressure hot water system available 24 hours a day in all private bathrooms.
